90c2f73c5ca752d6.resultTeX: \frac{m^2}{2 \varepsilon^2}+\frac{-\frac{M^2}{4}+\frac{3 m^2}{2}+m^2 (-\log (m^2))}{\varepsilon}+\left(m^2 H\left(0,1-m^2 M^{-2}\,;1\right)+\frac{1}{2} m^2^2 M^{-2} \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)-\frac{1}{2} m^2 \log ^2\left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)+\frac{1}{2} M^2 \log (m^2)-\frac{1}{2} M^2 \log \left(\frac{m^2}{m^2-M^2}\right)-\frac{13 M^2}{8}+\frac{1}{2} m^2 \zeta(2)+\frac{\pi ^2 m^2}{6}+3 m^2+m^2 \log ^2(m^2)-3 m^2 \log (m^2)\right)+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
